name: Jack's Veggie Burger
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal grill and let it burn down to embers.
2. In a large mixing bowl, mash the lentils until smooth. Add all other ingredients and mix until thoroughly combined. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
3. Form into burgers. Brush the burgers with olive oil and grill for 6 minutes on each side or until done. Serve hot with your favorite condiments.
Yield: 6 servings
